title: Dekton Remove-It Pro Screw Remover-Removes Any Screw Or Bolt| Durable Hardened Steel Bits| Quick And Easy To Use| Suitable For Use With All Standard Speed Drills Including Phillips, Flat & Pozidrive
features: Perfect for removing damaged or embedded screws quickly and easily.
Suitable for general purpose, workshop, automotive, crafts and hobbies.
An essential part of your toolkit.
description: From the manufacturer DEKTON products offer great value for money whilst incorporating useful features which improve performance and user experience. Where applicable, our products comply with the latest British and European regulations. All DEKTON products are manufactured to high quality standards that undergo excellent quality control through our partners worldwide. DEKTON DAMAGE SCREW REMOVER Remove any screw and bolts. Durable hardened steel bits. Quick and easy to use. Works even on jagged, uneven or rough breaks. Self centering tip. Compatible with keyless chuck systems. Works with any drill. Include storage case. DEKTON DAMAGE SCREW REMOVER Drill out Flip Over Extract DEKTON Damage Screw Remover Item Weight 132 g Product Dimensions 13 x 13 x 20.5 cm Colour Silver DEKTON DAMAGE SCREW REMOVER Item Weight 132 g Product Dimensions 13 x 13 x 20.5 cm Colour Silver DEKTON DAMAGE SCREW REMOVER Item Weight 132 g Product Dimensions 13 x 13 x 20.5 cm Colour Silver DEKTON DAMAGE SCREW REMOVER Item Weight 132 g Product Dimensions 13 x 13 x 20.5 cm Colour Silver
